---
english_title: |
  Title Here (*Latin Species Name*)
french_title: |
  Titre ici (*Nom latin de l'espèce*)

author: |
  Alice C. Assmar^1^,
  Howard W. Stiff^2^,
  Athena D. Ogden^2^, 
  David Hunt^3^, 
  Yuliya Shtymburska^4^,
  Sandra Emry^5^, and
  Patrick Thompson^2^

english_address: |
  ^1^Lyman Entomological Museum\
     McGill University\
     21111 Lakeshore Road\
     Sainte-Anne-de-Bellevue, Quebec, H9X 3V9, Canada\
  \
  ^2^Pacific Biological Station\
     Fisheries and Oceans Canada\
     3190 Hammond Bay Road\
     Nanaimo, British Columbia, V9T 6N7, Canada\
  \
  ^3^Biology Department\
     McGill University\
     1205 Docteur Penfield\
     Montreal, Quebec, H3A 1B1, Canada\
  \
  ^4^Department\
     \
     d\
     a\
  \
  ^5^Department\
     \
     \
     \
french_address: |
  ^1^Musée entomologique Lyman\
     Université McGill\
     21111 rue Lakeshore\
     Sainte-Anne-de-Bellevue, Québec, H9X 3V9, Canada\
  \
  ^2^Station biologique du Pacifique\
     Pêches et Océans Canada\
     3190 Hammond Bay Road\
     Nanaimo, Colombie-Britannique, V9T 6N7, Canada\
  \
  ^3^Département de biologie\
     Université McGill\
     1205 rue Docteur Penfield\
     Montréal, Québec, H3A 1B1, Canada\

english_region: "Pacific Region"
french_region: "Région du Pacifique"

year: "2026"
report_number: "000"

english_preamble_pages: "iv"
french_preamble_pages: "iv"
english_content_pages: "999"
french_content_pages: "999"
english_doi: "###"
french_doi: "###"
english_isbn: "###"
french_isbn: "###"
english_cat_no: "###"
french_cat_no: "###"

abstract: |
  Here is the abstract text. It must not be more than 1/2 page (roughly 400 words).

  Start new paragraphs after a blank line and with 2 spaces indent.

output:
 csasdown::techreport_docx:
   french: false
knit: (function(input, ...) csasdown::render())
bibliography: ["bib/DFO-ATS-Report-refs.bib", "bib/refs.bib"]
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, cache=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='hide', warning=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(
  #  cache = TRUE, # cache all chunks?
  #  autodep = TRUE, # try to guess which chunks depend on which in cache?
  fig.width = 6, # 'internal' plotting figure width (inches)
  out.width = "80%", # output plotting width; adjust here or by chunk if desired
  fig.asp = 1 / 1.618, # golden ratio; adjust here or by chunk if desired
  dpi = 200 # adjust to taste; larger = higher resolution but larger file size
)
```

```{r load-libraries-csasdown}
library(csasdown) # for new_appendix(), current_appendix(), appendix_table_caption()
library(flextable) # recommended package for adding tables
```

```{r table-settings}
# recommended table settings to match CSAS table style and accessibility standards
flextable::set_flextable_defaults(
  font.size = 10,
  padding.left = 3, 
  padding.right = 3, 
  padding.top = 1, 
  padding.bottom = 1,
  na_str = "-",
  theme_fun = "theme_booktabs"
)
```

```{r load-libraries-user}
library(dplyr) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(grateful)
# add more packages here as needed
```
